---
title: "Decision Theory"
description: "Expected utility, prospect theory, ambiguity, sequential and group decision-making."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
<span data-topic-count="decision-theory"></span> TUTORIALS
:::

# Decision Theory

Expected utility, prospect theory, ambiguity, sequential and group decision-making.
